untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders pattern identification and point-and-figure chart analysis require pattern recognition algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set. The measurement method (distance from head top to neckline, projected downward) requires explicit chart pattern detection and geometric calculation that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV-derived technical indicators. Neckline penetration point determination also requires manual pattern identification.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally based on candlestick/point-and-figure pattern recognition rather than quantitative indicators. The core logic—identifying a H&S pattern, measuring head height, and projecting a target—requires visual pattern detection. A practical approximation could use support/resistance levels (pivot, s1, s2) and price action, but this would not capture the true essence of the pattern-based trading rule as described in the source material.
